description: Search and list venue-specific LaTeX templates by venue name, template type, or keyword, and print each match's formatting requirements (page limit, citation style, layout, anonymization).
rules: read-only — never writes or mutates templates
pure Python stdlib — runs fully offline
at least one of VENUE / TEMPLATE_TYPE / KEYWORD should be set; otherwise the full catalog is listed
output written to record_store as query.txt
usage: Set VENUE (e.g. Nature, NeurIPS, PLOS ONE), optionally TEMPLATE_TYPE (journals|posters|grants|all) and/or KEYWORD. Output: query.txt.
limitation: Catalog is the built-in TEMPLATES table (journals, posters, grants). Reports requirements known to the script; does not parse the .tex assets themselves.
